creator: yermulnik@gmail.com
text:
Hello!

I've got the same build failure as described in PR ports/144294
("sorry, unimplemented: 64-bit mode not compiled in") on FreeBSD
6.1-RC2 i386 and FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE i386 with up-to-date ports
collection.
And proposed patch helped on both sandboxes.
Is it possible to incorporate this patch into the java/openjdk6?

-- 
George L. Yermulnik
[YZ-RIPE]
